title: Server actions: extend services/review.ts with reject + modify (layer-flip) + search + defer
description: Layer the remaining four fab_review actions on top of TASK-001 foundation. modify implements the layer-flip semantics (only legal stable_id mutation): when input.changes.layer differs from current frontmatter layer, allocate new id under target layer, git mv across layer roots, emit knowledge_layer_changed. search reads existing description_index (or in-memory scan) supporting topic/type/tag/date filters. defer emits knowledge_deferred with optional until TTL. reject emits knowledge_rejected and optionally deletes pending file.

files.change: Add 4 new action branches in the existing switch: 'reject' (for each pending_path: emit knowledge_rejected with reason; if input flag delete=true, fs.unlink the file; return rejected[]), 'modify' (parse frontmatter; if changes.layer differs → layer-flip: allocate new id under new layer, execFileSync git mv from old <layer>/<type>/<id>--<slug>.md to new <layer>/<type>/<new-id>--<slug>.md, emit knowledge_layer_changed{from_layer,to_layer}; non-layer changes → atomicWriteText with updated frontmatter only; return {pending_path, prior_stable_id?, new_stable_id?}), 'search' (load all canonical+pending, filter by query against title/summary/tags + apply filters, return items[]), 'defer' (emit knowledge_deferred for each pending_path with until/reason; return deferred[]).

implementation: Implement 'reject' branch: validate pending_paths each under .fabric/knowledge/pending/; for each: emit appendEventLedgerEvent({event_type:'knowledge_rejected', timestamp, reason:input.reason}); rejected.push(pending_path); if (input as any).delete_file === true → fs.unlink (rc.3 pre-lock schema does NOT include delete flag; defer this option to rc.4 — for rc.3, always retain file with .rejected.md sibling marker OR keep file untouched and rely on doctor cleanup). Decision: keep file untouched; doctor.ts owns cleanup in rc.4. Return {action:'reject', rejected: pending_paths}

Implement 'modify' branch: parse current frontmatter from input.pending_path; current path must already be canonical (post-approve) or pending (pre-approve). Compute current layer from path segment (.fabric/knowledge/<layer>/<type>/...). If input.changes.layer is set AND differs from current layer → LAYER-FLIP path; else → in-place rewrite

Modify in-place: atomicWriteText same path with frontmatter merged from input.changes (title/summary/maturity/tags). Emit no layer_changed event. Return {action:'modify', pending_path, prior_stable_id:undefined, new_stable_id:undefined}

Modify layer-flip: instantiate KnowledgeIdAllocator(metaPath); newStableId = await allocator.allocate(input.changes.layer, mapTypeToTypeCode(currentType)); priorStableId = currentFrontmatter.id; newPath = join(projectRoot,'.fabric','knowledge',input.changes.layer,currentType,`${newStableId}--${slug}.md`); emit knowledge_promote_started (per Q5 — layer flip is a promotion-class transition); execFileSync git mv from-to; rewrite frontmatter id+layer fields; emit knowledge_layer_changed{from_layer:currentLayer, to_layer:input.changes.layer, stable_id:newStableId, reason:`layer_flip:${priorStableId}->${newStableId}`}; return {action:'modify', pending_path:relPathOfNew, prior_stable_id, new_stable_id}

Implement 'search' branch: read all .md under .fabric/knowledge/{team,personal}/<type>/ AND .fabric/knowledge/pending/<type>/ — for each parse frontmatter, build searchable record {pending_path, type, layer, maturity, tags, title, summary}; apply filters (type, layer, maturity, tags subset); apply query as case-insensitive substring match across title+summary+tags; return {action:'search', items}. Performance: <50ms for repos with <500 entries (acceptable; rc.4 may add description_index acceleration)

Implement 'defer' branch: for each pending_path validate, emit appendEventLedgerEvent({event_type:'knowledge_deferred', timestamp, reason:input.reason, until:input.until}); deferred.push(pending_path); return {action:'defer', deferred}
Update default branch: remove 'unsupported action — TASK-002' throw; the switch is now exhaustive (TS exhaustiveness check via `const _exhaustive: never = input` pattern)

Add unit tests to review.test.ts: test_reject_emits_rejected_event_and_returns_paths, test_modify_inplace_writes_frontmatter, test_modify_layer_flip_allocates_new_id_and_git_mvs_across_layers, test_modify_layer_flip_emits_layer_changed_with_from_to, test_search_filters_by_type_and_tag, test_search_query_substring_matches_title, test_defer_emits_deferred_event_with_until
Run `pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-server test`; commit as 'feat(server): extend fab_review with reject+modify+search+defer (rc.3 TASK-002)'

reference.pattern: Switch-dispatch service extension (incremental action branches sharing helpers)
reference.examples: Reuse listPending/approveOne helpers from TASK-001; share parseFrontmatter + rewriteFrontmatter helpers across branches

criteria: All 6 action branches implemented; TS exhaustiveness check passes (no fall-through to default)

modify with layer change KT-D-X → KP-D-Y allocates new id under new layer, git mvs file across .fabric/knowledge/team/<type>/ → .fabric/knowledge/personal/<type>/, emits knowledge_layer_changed with from_layer:team, to_layer:personal (verified by integration test)
modify in-place (no layer change) updates frontmatter without git mv and without emitting layer_changed (verified)
search with filters {type:'guidelines', tags:['hooks']} returns only matching entries from both canonical and pending trees (verified by seeded fixture)
reject emits knowledge_rejected event with input.reason populated (verified)
defer emits knowledge_deferred with optional until timestamp populated when provided (verified)
review.ts overall lines coverage >= 90% after TASK-002 lands (rc3-coverage-gate.mjs in TASK-009 confirms)

rationale.chosen_approach: Incremental switch-branch addition; reuse parse/rewrite helpers; layer-flip = drop-old-id + allocate-new-id + git-mv (matches Q-review locked decision)
alternatives_considered: Layer flip preserves stable_id and only swaps prefix character (KT-D-1 → KP-D-1) — rejected: counters are per-(layer,type), so preserving id violates KP/KT counter independence
search uses description_index (rc.2 grill-followup added tags field) — deferred to rc.4: index hydration logic absent in rc.3 scope; in-memory scan is sufficient for current corpus sizes
decision_factors: Layer-flip must be auditable with from_layer/to_layer in ledger (event schema requires both)
Search must work across canonical AND pending trees (review skill needs to find both for dedup detection)
reject without file deletion preserves audit history; rc.4 doctor can vacuum
rationale.tradeoffs: In-memory search is O(N) — acceptable for typical corpora (<500 entries) but will need indexing in rc.4

manual_checks: Manually call fab_review modify with layer flip on a canonical entry; verify file moved across layer roots in git status; agents.meta.json shows incremented counter for new layer
Manually call fab_review search with type filter; verify only matching type entries returned
success_metrics: All 6 action branches reachable from integration test
TS compiler reports no exhaustiveness warning

risks.description: Layer flip across roots fails when target dir does not exist yet (.fabric/knowledge/personal/<type>/ may not be initialized)
risks.mitigation: Call ensureParentDirectory before git mv; mkdir -p semantics make this idempotent
risks.fallback: Catch ENOENT, mkdir, retry once; if second attempt fails emit knowledge_promote_failed

risks.description: Search performance degrades on large corpora (>1000 entries)
risks.mitigation: Document the O(N) nature; rc.4 may add description_index acceleration
risks.fallback: If users hit perf issues mid-rc.3 lifecycle, ship a quick optimization in rc.3.1
